raw:
## Completed
Threaded the Definition-of-Done rationale into Foreman release commits and the `done_evaluated` ledger event.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/ship.ts` - added optional `doneSummary` commit body block.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - passes Gate 2 DoD checklist into release commits and logs checklist in `done_evaluated`.
- `extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh` - added compatibility and DoD commit-message assertions.

## How To Verify
```bash
set -euo pipefail
for test in \
  extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/done_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh \
  extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh; do
  bash "$test"
done
```

## Notes
All listed suites passed. On Gate 2 approval for this task, the auto-commit message should now include the live “Definition of Done:” block.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

  ],
  "howToVerify": "set -euo pipefail; for test in extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/done_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh; do bash \"$test\"; done"
